title: Props.children and Composition
description: Use children to compose components flexibly.

slides.title: The Special `children` Prop 👶
slides.content:
# What's Inside the Tags? When you nest content inside a component, that content is passed as the `children` prop. ```jsx

Title

Content

 ``` Inside `Card`, you can access the nested elements via `props.children`. This is perfect for creating wrapper components like cards, modals, or layout components.

slides.title: Using children

quizData.question: The `children` prop is automatically passed to every component.
quizData.explanation: Yes, any content between the opening and closing tags of a component is passed as the `children` prop.
